The event-loop block is FIXED (0615bc5: _draft_passes_wrapper now awaited via asyncio.to_thread at both call sites in generator/abstractive_writer.py) and Fable-signed-off on an A/B probe (2.06s serialized -> 0.60s parallel). (2) Then push a REAL full-346-basket render and prove depth.
